title: use Makefile var for go compiler
body:
This will allow compilation with a custom go binary,
for example /usr/lib/go-1.8/bin/go instead of /usr/bin/go on Ubuntu
16.04 which is still version 1.6

Signed-off-by: Lokesh Mandvekar <lsm5@fedoraproject.org>

@nalind @rhatdan @TomSweeneyRedHat PTAL .. similar for skopeo was merged earlier https://github.com/projectatomic/skopeo/pull/424

comments.body: There's a call in the `runc` target which this should probably also change.
ah yes, thanks, pushing a new one..

:pushpin: Commit ca29dc5 has been approved by `rhatdan`
